# Internal Fixture SwiftData Schema Skill

Return output in Japanese.

## Trigger Conditions

- Inspect SwiftData schema entities.
- Review relationships and migration risk.

## Workflow

1. Read `@Model` entities and relationships.
2. Summarize a schema review with migration hotspots.
